description_long: This object consists of three wooden storage crates arranged in a pyramid formation, with two crates at the base and one on top. The crates are constructed from dark, weathered wooden planks, each framed with thicker wooden beams and reinforced at the corners with visible metal fasteners. The top crate features a hinged lid that is partially open, revealing a spacious, empty interior. The wood grain and texture are prominent, giving the crates a rugged, utilitarian appearance suitable for urban or industrial environments. The overall structure appears sturdy and capable of supporting additional weight on top. The design is simple and functional, with no visible handles or labeling.
description: A stack of three dark wooden crates, with the top crate featuring a partially open hinged lid and visible metal fasteners. The crates have a rugged, weathered appearance and are arranged in a stable pyramid formation.
description_view_0: Front view showing three stacked wooden crates, with the top crate's lid open and the interiors of the crates partially visible.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the open lid of the upper crate and the alignment of the crates beneath it.
description_view_2: Angled view emphasizing the open lid and the depth of the top crate, with the front faces of all three crates visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the closed backs of the two lower crates and the open lid of the top crate from behind.
